title: Align compare timeline with snapshot timeline
summary: The repository comparison timeline now uses a horizontal connected-dot rail that matches the snapshot timeline language while preserving compare event titles, labels, descriptions, and dates.
userVisibleChange: Users see comparison timeline entries on a horizontal line with connected milestones, making the compare page feel consistent with the repository snapshot timeline while keeping each event's phase, title, snapshot label, and date visible.

risks.title: Very long timeline titles still clamp to preserve row height, so users may need to open the snapshot for full text.

decisions.title: Reuse the snapshot timeline's dot-and-line metaphor horizontally for compare entries instead of a plain card strip.
Keep timeline cards compact and horizontally scrollable so large comparison ranges stay scannable without adding vertical height.

validation.command: npm run build in ui passed
Playwright verified /repositories/eve Compare Last 5 timeline in light and dark modes.
